race.description: Eyre Car Centre Ht3 Adelaide Autumn Series Handicap
race.comment: RAZELLA (11) made light work of her rivals here last time when working home over the top. Crowther sticks and can keep the ball rolling. THERE GOES MY HERO (4) is knocking on the door, turning in another solid effort here last time when launching late to earn another minor finish. If they can utilise the low draw she will prove very tough to stop. POWER PRIMO (9) strode forward early from her wide draw over 1350m at this track last time, leading for much of the way before being collared on the line. Will look to do the same from her wide draw and should give backers another bold sight. LAVA LAD (1) jumped from a wide alley last start and stuck on bravely into fifth over this track and distance. Has a much better draw this time and gets in well with the 2kg claim. Can bounce back. TALENT SCOUT (6) is an interesting runner. Has been very competitive in stronger grade of late but this is a sharp drop in trip.
